questions.prompt: An MSP tech needs to confirm a customer's mail flow connector status. Which header-bar icon takes them there?
questions.explanation: Mail Flow lives under the cogwheel Settings menu. The question-mark Help menu is for Diagnostic Logs and Message Capture; the initials menu is for the user's account and subscription switching.

questions.prompt: MSP staff with access to multiple customer subscriptions switch between them via the initials icon (Account menu) at the top right.
questions.explanation: The Account menu's Change Subscription option is the supported switcher. Always confirm the active subscription in the header before making any change.
